title: oscillator
description: Oscillator / crystal component data. The presence of the 'oscillator' field at the top level of a TDAS document discriminates the family. Covers bare quartz resonators (technology=quartzCrystal) and every packaged oscillator class (XO, TCXO, VCXO, OCXO, MEMS, silicon-RC, programmable). The `behavioral` block is the ideal periodic-source atom consumed by CIAS control bricks (PWM ramp, PCM clock, resonant VCO); it is valid on an otherwise part-less document, exactly like the AAS comparator.

behavioral.title: oscillatorBehavioral
behavioral.description: Simulator-agnostic IDEAL periodic source (PWM ramp, clock, resonant drive) — distinct from the datasheet `electrical` selection parameters. Instantaneous frequency f = frequency when frequencyControl is absent, else f = frequency + gain*v(control+, control-) (a VCO; f clamps at 0 — negative instantaneous frequency is meaningless). Present on an otherwise part-less document to describe an ideal control block. A backend (CiasCircuitConverter) emits: fixed-frequency sawtooth/triangle/square -> native PULSE independent source, fixed sine -> SINE/SIN source; any oscillator WITH frequencyControl -> canonical phase-accumulator subcircuit (G-source + 1 F capacitor integrating f(t) into a phase node, shaping B-source with floor()-wrap for saw/triangle/square or sin(2*pi*phase) for sine).

shape.description: sawtooth rises 0..1 of the span and snaps back (PWM ramp); triangle is symmetric; square uses dutyCycle; sine for resonant drive.

amplitude.description: Peak amplitude, in V: the waveform spans offset..offset+amplitude (sawtooth/triangle/square) or offset±amplitude (sine).

offset.description: DC offset, in V (see amplitude for the span convention). Required — no implicit 0.

phase.description: Starting phase at t=0, in rad. Absent = the waveform origin (a defined convention, not a numeric default); include the field whenever a non-origin start matters.

dutyCycle.description: High fraction of the period. Only meaningful (and required) for shape='square'.

frequencyControl.description: Present = this oscillator is a VCO (LLC/resonant FM control). The control pin pair is part of the component's pin set in CIAS.

gain.description: VCO gain k, in Hz/V: f = frequency + k*v(control+, control-).

datasheetInfo.title: oscillatorDatasheetInfo
datasheetInfo.description: All information extracted from the oscillator/crystal datasheet.

electrical.title: oscillatorElectrical
electrical.description: Oscillator/crystal electricals — the live distributor filter set plus the headline datasheet specs, nothing else (no derived quantities). Fractional-frequency specs (frequencyTolerance, frequencyStability, agingPerYear, pullRange, dutyCycle, spread-spectrum bandwidth) are DIMENSIONLESS fractions (1 ppm = 1e-6; 1% = 0.01 — the same field serves ppm-class quartz and %-class ceramic/RC parts). Condition-qualified specs carry their condition: rmsPhaseJitter carries its integration band. Bare-resonator fields (loadCapacitance, equivalentSeriesResistance, resonantImpedance, builtInCapacitance, shuntCapacitance C0, motionalCapacitance C1) apply to quartzCrystal/ceramicResonator; pullRange (absolute pull range, APR-style) to voltage/digitally-pulled classes; supply and enableFunction to every class EXCEPT bare resonators. The operating temperature range that stability is specified over lives in datasheetInfo.thermal (PEAS mixin), not here.

frequency.description: Nominal output (or resonant) frequency, in Hz.

frequencyTolerance.description: Initial frequency tolerance at 25 degC, dimensionless (1 ppm = 1e-6). Stored as the +/- half-band magnitude.

frequencyStability.description: Frequency stability over the operating temperature range, dimensionless (1 ppm = 1e-6). Stored as the +/- half-band magnitude.

agingPerYear.description: Fractional frequency aging per year, dimensionless (1 ppm/yr = 1e-6). First-year value where the datasheet distinguishes.

rmsPhaseJitter.description: RMS phase jitter over the stated integration band, in s.

jitterBandLow.description: Lower edge of the jitter integration band, in Hz (typically 12 kHz).

jitterBandHigh.description: Upper edge of the jitter integration band, in Hz (typically 20 MHz).

startupTime.description: Power-on to stable-output time, in s. For OCXO this is the warm-up time to initial frequency tolerance.

pullRange.description: Absolute pull range (APR), dimensionless (1 ppm = 1e-6), stored as the +/- half-band magnitude. Voltage/digitally-pulled classes (VCXO, VCTCXO, DCXO) only.

dutyCycle.description: Output duty-cycle / symmetry window, dimensionless fraction of the period (a 45-55% spec is {minimum: 0.45, maximum: 0.55}).

spreadSpectrum.description: Present only on spread-spectrum / EMI-reduction oscillators (SSXO).

bandwidth.description: Modulation bandwidth, dimensionless fraction of the center frequency (a +/-0.25% spread is 0.0025).

mode.description: downSpread modulates below the nominal frequency only; centerSpread symmetrically around it.

loadCapacitance.description: Specified load capacitance CL, in F (bare resonators).

equivalentSeriesResistance.description: Maximum equivalent series resistance ESR, in Ohm (bare quartz crystals).

resonantImpedance.description: Maximum resonant impedance, in Ohm (ceramic resonators — their ESR-equivalent filter).

builtInCapacitance.description: Value of the built-in load capacitors, in F (three-terminal ceramic resonators). Absent = no built-in capacitors.

shuntCapacitance.description: C0 — static shunt capacitance across the resonator terminals, in F (electrode + holder capacitance; typically 1–7 pF for quartz). Bare resonators only.

motionalCapacitance.description: C1 (Cm) — motional-arm capacitance of the equivalent circuit, in F (typically 1–30 fF for quartz). Together with C0 it determines pullability: ΔF/F = C1 / (2·(C0 + CL)), which lets a load-capacitance mismatch check be exact instead of estimated. Bare resonators only.
